title: Maximize the Cost Efficiency of AI Agents on Azure
summary: Maximize the ROI of AI agent investments by making cost-conscious, informed decisions at every stage. This learning path offers actionable guidance, from identifying high-impact use cases and understanding cost drivers, to forecasting ROI, adopting best practices, designing scalable and effective architectures, and optimizing ongoing investments.

sections.title: Maximize the Cost Efficiency of AI Agents on Azure
sections.summary: Maximize the ROI of AI agent investments by making cost-conscious, informed decisions at every stage. This learning path offers actionable guidance, from identifying high-impact use cases and understanding cost drivers, to forecasting ROI, adopting best practices, designing scalable and effective architectures, and optimizing ongoing investments.

lessons.title: Identify and Prioritize High-Impact AI Agent Use Cases
lessons.content_md:
Uncover and evaluate AI agent use cases that deliver measurable business value with financial efficiency.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/identify-ai-agent-use-case/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Identify and Prioritize High-Impact AI Agent Use Cases

lessons.title: Understand the key cost drivers of AI agents
lessons.content_md:
Developing and deploying AI agents can unlock transformative capabilities for businesses, but it requires careful planning and budgeting.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/ai-agent-cost-structure/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Understand the key cost drivers of AI agents

lessons.title: Forecast the return on investment (ROI) of AI agents
lessons.content_md:
AI agents are rapidly transforming how organizations operate, automating tasks, enhancing decision-making, and improving customer experiences. But to scale adoption and secure stakeholder buy-in, it's not enough to showcase innovation; leaders must clearly demonstrate the business value these agents deliver.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/forecast-agent-return-investment/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Forecast the return on investment (ROI) of AI agents

lessons.title: Implement best practices to empower AI agent efficiency and ensure long-term success
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to implement best practices for AI agent workloads by leveraging frameworks like AI Center of Excellence, FinOps, GenAI Ops, Cloud Adoption Framework, and Well-Architected Framework.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/adopt-ai-agent-best-practice/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement best practices to empower AI agent efficiency and ensure long-term success

lessons.title: Maximize cost efficiency by choosing the right AI agent development approach on Azure
lessons.content_md:
Evaluate when to develop custom AI agents tailored to your needs and when to deploy prebuilt solutions from trusted platforms. Learn how to assess trade-offs in time-to-value, complexity, customization, and operational cost. This module also guides you in selecting the right models for your AI agents, from lightweight task-specific agents to advanced multi-modal agents.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/maximize-cost-efficiency-ai-agent-development/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Maximize cost efficiency by choosing the right AI agent development approach on Azure

lessons.title: Architect scalable and cost-efficient AI agent solutions on Azure
lessons.content_md:
This module guides learners through designing AI agent architectures that scale with business demand, provide deep visibility into cost drivers, and support long-term governance. Participants explore reference architectures, orchestration patterns, and financial design principles that ensure operational efficiency, cost control, and strategic alignment.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/architect-scalable-ai-agent-solutions/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Architect scalable and cost-efficient AI agent solutions on Azure

lessons.title: Manage and optimize AI agent investments on Azure
lessons.content_md:
Managing and optimizing AI agent investments on Azure is now more streamlined and powerful with the built-in observability capabilities in Microsoft Foundry. These tools provide enterprise-grade observability, governance, and performance optimization capabilities essential for deploying intelligent, goal-driven agents at scale. These tools provide enterprise-grade observability, governance, and performance optimization capabilities essential for deploying intelligent, goal-driven agents at scale.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-optimize-agent-investment-azure/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage and optimize AI agent investments on Azure

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Maximize the Cost Efficiency of AI Agents on Azure
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Maximize the Cost Efficiency of AI Agents on Azure**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
